description: Evaluation query set for V5. 8 topic pairs (keyword + natural_language) to expose strengths/weaknesses of each V. Keyword queries: V1-TF-IDF; natural language and semantic queries: V3-V4.

queries.query: a society where an authoritarian government monitors and controls its citizens
magic school young wizard powers coming of age

Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
